summary: Iteration 26: Comprehensive testing of new features - Footer 3-column structure, dynamic page title, CMS modal scrollability, per-page layout system, Gallery Albums CRUD, Service detail pages, and ServicesManager new fields. All 23 backend tests passed. Frontend testing verified all major features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed LayoutAboutBio.js - was calling non-existent publicAPI.getSocialLinks(), now uses useSettings() context like Footer.js
seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up during backend testing (TEST_ prefixed albums, services, pages)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 26 features are working. Footer has unified 3-column structure across all themes. Dynamic page title shows 'Strategic Business Consulting' from settings.tagline. CMS modals have max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto for scrollability. PagesManager has 5 layout options (Default, About/Bio, Services Grid, Gallery Albums, Full Content). ServicesManager has short_description, full_content, and image fields. Gallery Albums Manager at /admin/gallery-albums supports CRUD for albums and photos. Service detail pages at /service/:serviceId show full_content. Sub-gallery at /album/:albumId shows image viewer with thumbnails.

footer_structure.stay_updated_column: PASS - Email input and Subscribe button

layout_system.layout_selector: PASS - 5 layout options with visual previews
layout_system.layout_2_services_grid: PASS - Card grid layout component exists
layout_system.layout_3_gallery_albums: PASS - Album grid layout component exists
layout_system.layout_5_full_content: PASS - Single column layout component exists

admin_panel.album_dialog: PASS - Title, Description, Cover Image, Order fields
